package.name: semantic_reasoning
package.description: Phase-2 agentic reasoning for semantic_nav. A shared tool layer (query the semantic map, navigate via Nav2, read the robot pose) is driven by two frontends over the same registry: a local ollama tool-calling agent exposed as the ExecuteTask action, and (deferred) an MCP server for Claude. The reasoning loop and tool layer are pure and mockable; the rclpy node is the thin shell.
